mapper.sql: id,merchant_code, merchant_id, pay_channel_id, pay_type_id, type,order_no,currency_id, item_id, chain_tag,item_name, tx_id, user_id, tg_user_id, channel_id, shareholder_id, amount, exchange_type, fee, real_amount, law_amount, from_addr, to_addr, order_status,screen_shot, remark, check_user_id, check_username, check_time, up_order_no, up_order_info, up_notify_info, withdraw_time, create_time,sign,sign_time

select id, merchant_code, merchant_id, pay_channel_id, pay_type_id, type, order_no, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, tx_id, user_id, tg_user_id, channel_id, shareholder_id, amount, exchange_type, fee, real_amount, law_amount, from_addr, to_addr, order_status, screen_shot, remark, check_user_id, check_username, check_time, up_order_no, up_order_info, up_notify_info, withdraw_time, sign, sign_time, create_time from t_order_withdraw
select a.*, u.user_tg_username as username from t_order_withdraw a left join t_user u on u.user_id = a.user_id
mapper.insert:
insert into t_order_withdraw
merchant_code, merchant_id, pay_channel_id, pay_type_id, type, order_no, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, tx_id, user_id, tg_user_id, channel_id, shareholder_id, amount, exchange_type, fee, real_amount, law_amount, from_addr, to_addr, order_status, screen_shot, remark, check_user_id, check_username, check_time, up_order_no, up_order_info, up_notify_info, withdraw_time, sign_time, sign, create_time,
#{merchantCode}, #{merchantId}, #{payChannelId}, #{payTypeId}, #{type}, #{orderNo}, #{currencyId}, #{itemId}, #{chainTag}, #{itemName}, #{txId}, #{userId}, #{tgUserId}, #{channelId}, #{shareholderId}, #{amount}, #{exchangeType}, #{fee}, #{realAmount}, #{lawAmount}, #{fromAddr}, #{toAddr}, #{orderStatus}, #{screenShot}, #{remark}, #{checkUserId}, #{checkUsername}, #{checkTime}, #{upOrderNo}, #{upOrderInfo}, #{upNotifyInfo}, #{withdrawTime}, #{signTime}, #{sign}, #{createTime},
mapper.update:
update t_order_withdraw
merchant_code = #{merchantCode}, merchant_id = #{merchantId}, pay_channel_id = #{payChannelId}, pay_type_id = #{payTypeId},
type = #{type}, order_no = #{orderNo}, currency_id = #{currencyId}, item_id = #{itemId}, chain_tag = #{chainTag}, item_name = #{itemName}, tx_id = #{txId}, user_id = #{userId}, tg_user_id = #{tgUserId}, channel_id = #{channelId}, shareholder_id = #{shareholderId}, amount = #{amount}, exchange_type = #{exchangeType}, fee = #{fee}, real_amount = #{realAmount}, law_amount = #{lawAmount}, from_addr = #{fromAddr}, to_addr = #{toAddr}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, screen_shot = #{screenShot}, remark = #{remark}, check_user_id = #{checkUserId}, check_username = #{checkUsername}, check_time = #{checkTime}, up_order_no = #{upOrderNo}, up_order_info = #{upOrderInfo}, up_notify_info = #{upNotifyInfo}, withdraw_time = #{withdrawTime}, sign_time = #{signTime}, sign = #{sign}, create_time = #{createTime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_order_withdraw where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select * from t_order_withdraw where sign is null order by id asc limit #{start},#{limit}
